name: Paprika Chops
recipeIngredient: 1 Onion, Sliced and Separated into Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix paprika with a generous amount of freshly ground black pepper in a dish.
2. Wash and dry the chops.
3. Coat the chops evenly with the paprika and black pepper mixture.
4. Lightly oil a 9 X 13 baking tray.
5. Layer the onions, sliced bell pepper, potato slices, and mushrooms in the tray, sprinkling with chopped garlic.
6. Place the coated chops on top of the vegetables.
7. Bake for about 15 minutes, then turn the chops and cook for another 15 minutes.
8. Dollop sour cream over the chops and return to the oven for an additional 10 minutes.
9. Serve with your favorite vegetables, such as cauliflower and a white sauce made from milk and flour.
